summary: Phase 3 feature testing complete. All 15 features verified. Backend API tests (19/19 passed). Frontend UI tests all passed. New endpoints /api/mapa/pines, /api/analytics/whatsapp-click, /api/leads/export-csv working correctly. Admin EmpresaForm has Sede Principal and Puntos de Operación sections with ActivityLocationManager. Mapa page uses Leaflet with activity filters. Empresa detail shows Leaflet map with all pins.

issues: Minor hydration warning in console about <span> inside <select> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/mapa/pines returns all activity pins across empresas (currently 2 HQ pins since no ubicaciones_actividades yet)
GET /api/analytics/overview includes whatsapp_clicks in totales (6 KPIs total)
GET /api/leads/export-csv returns CSV with UTF-8 BOM, accented characters, correct headers
Map page (/mapa) loads with Leaflet map, filter panel on left with activity filters
Map page filter by activity works (buttons change active state)
Map page search input filters pins by empresa or activity name
Empresa detail page (/empresas/:slug) shows Leaflet map with all pins instead of iframe
Empresa detail shows unique activity names (not repeated UUIDs)
Admin Dashboard shows 6 KPI cards including WA Clicks metric
Admin Leads page has Export CSV button that downloads file
Admin EmpresaForm has 'Sede Principal' MapPicker section
Admin EmpresaForm has 'Puntos de Operación' ActivityLocationManager section
PUT /api/empresas/:id with ubicaciones_actividades saves pin data correctly
Empresa model has ubicaciones_actividades field (list of dicts)
WhatsApp click tracking increments counter in analytics
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/mapa/pines correctly returns HQ pins for empresas without ubicaciones_actividades
server.py: /api/analytics/whatsapp-click uses upsert pattern for counter
server.py: /api/leads/export-csv includes UTF-8 BOM (\ufeff) for Excel compatibility
models.py: Empresa model has ubicaciones_actividades: List[dict] = []
Mapa.jsx: Complete rewrite with Leaflet, FitBounds component, glassmorphism filter panel
EmpresaDetalle.jsx: EmpresaMapView component shows all pins (HQ + activity locations)
EmpresaForm.jsx: Has both MapPicker for Sede Principal and ActivityLocationManager for Puntos de Operación
ActivityLocationManager.jsx: Activity tabs, add pin button, map click handler, pin list with notes
AdminDashboard.jsx: 6 KPI cards including WA Clicks with MessageCircle icon
AdminLeads.jsx: Export CSV button with handleExportCSV function using blob download
WhatsAppButton.jsx: Silent tracking with fire-and-forget axios.post().catch(() => {})
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing 3 empresas with HQ coordinates (latitud/longitud). Currently 2 HQ pins visible on map (empresas with coordinates but no ubicaciones_actividades).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features verified complete. Key new endpoints: GET /api/mapa/pines (returns array of pin objects with empresa and activity info), POST /api/analytics/whatsapp-click (fire-and-forget counter), GET /api/leads/export-csv (authenticated, returns CSV blob with UTF-8 BOM). Currently only 2 HQ pins exist since no ubicaciones_actividades have been added yet. Admin can add activity-specific pins via EmpresaForm > Puntos de Operación section. WhatsApp tracking is working (4+ clicks recorded). The Mapa page was completely rewritten with Leaflet (no longer using iframe). EmpresaDetalle map also uses Leaflet with EmpresaMapView component.

feature_verification.1_mapa_pines_endpoint: VERIFIED - GET /api/mapa/pines returns array of pins with empresa/activity info
feature_verification.2_mapa_pines_filter: VERIFIED - ?actividad=X filters pins by activity name
feature_verification.4_analytics_whatsapp_clicks: VERIFIED - GET /api/analytics/overview includes whatsapp_clicks in totales
feature_verification.5_leads_export_csv: VERIFIED - GET /api/leads/export-csv returns CSV with UTF-8 BOM
feature_verification.6_csv_headers: VERIFIED - CSV has headers: Nombre, Email, Empresa, Mensaje, Leído, Fecha
feature_verification.7_mapa_page_leaflet: VERIFIED - /mapa uses Leaflet with filter panel
feature_verification.10_empresa_detail_leaflet: VERIFIED - /empresas/:slug shows Leaflet map with EmpresaMapView
feature_verification.12_dashboard_6_kpis: VERIFIED - Dashboard shows 6 KPI cards including WA Clicks
feature_verification.13_leads_export_button: VERIFIED - Admin Leads page has 'Exportar CSV' button
feature_verification.14_empresa_form_sede: VERIFIED - EmpresaForm has 'Sede Principal' section with MapPicker
feature_verification.15_empresa_form_puntos: VERIFIED - EmpresaForm has 'Puntos de Operación' with ActivityLocationManager
